basicInfo.name: Nightmare Teo
basicInfo.flavor: The only thing known for certain about Teo is that he is a member of the Night Crows.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Petrify. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Talon Strike
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals Piercing damage equal to 130% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Petrify. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 130% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Corvus Eclipse
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 65% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Petrify. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - All Allies
 - Grants All Damage Nullification. [Ends After: Taking 1 Hit(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 65% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Crow's Eyes
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Revives with Immortality upon falling in battle. [Duration: 50 Turn(s)] [Once per Battle]
 - Grants Skill Cooldown Reset upon gaining Immortality.

profile.story:
Deep within the northern forests of the Endless Rampart lies a black moon, a remnant of the ancient war that remains unsealed to this day.
Despite this, Aisha has remained peaceful thanks to powerful guardians who have secretly stopped the abyssal monsters from spreading into the world.
These protectors are an ancient elf clan that existed since the time of Ragnarok.
Teo was one of them.
While his kin shunned the outside world, Teo was influenced by his human mother and left his home to see the world.
During his travels, he rose to unmatched renown, earning titles such as the Wind Warrior, the Strongest Swordsman in all of Aisha, and the Swordsmaster through his exploits in the Moonlit Isle civil war and the War of Destruction.
Scarred by the loss of loved ones in countless battles, Teo came to understand that when small evils gather to form a great evil, stopping them requires enormous sacrifices. Determined to prevent this cycle from repeating, he founded the Night Crows, an organization dedicated to dismantling evil before it could grow.
As a half-elf, Teo possesses an ageless appearance, belying the many years he has lived.
Alongside Pascal and Silvesta, he brought peace to Aisha and ascended as one of the Four Lords.
His blade is known as the Black Sword.
